content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:EPIII_RotS_poster.png|thumb|200px|[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] released in May 2005.]]

A list of events in '''2005''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 2|02]] – [[Frank Kelly Freas]] dies.
*[[January 24|24]] – [[TT Games]] is founded.
*[[January 25|25]] – ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 80|''Star Wars Insider'' 80]] published.

==February==
*[[February 2|02]] – [[Obsession 3|''Obsession'' 3]] published.
*[[February 8|08]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Microsoft Windows|Windows]] platform.
*[[February 9|09]] – [[Republic 73|''Republic'' 73]] published.
*[[February 23|23]] – [[Empire 29|''Empire'' 29]] published.
*23 – [[Star Wars Tales 22|''Star Wars Tales'' 22]] published.
*23 – ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 5]]'' published.
*[[February 28|28]] – ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' released to [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] and [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] platforms.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – [[Secrets of the Jedi (novel)|''Secrets of the Jedi'']] published.
*[[March 2|02]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 3]]'' published.
*[[March 4|04]] – [[Wookieepedia]] is founded under the name "Star Wars Wiki."
*04 – "[[When the Domino Falls]]" reprinted on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[March 8|08]] – ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' published.
*[[March 11|11]] – [[Star Wars Insider 81|''Star Wars Insider'' 81]] released for subscribers.
*[[March 16|16]] – [[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]] published.
*16 – [[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith 1|''Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith'' 1]] published.
*16 – [[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith (TPB)|''Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith'' trade paperback]] published.
*16 – ''[[Star Wars: Visionaries]]'' published.
*[[March 18|18]] – ''[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale (webstrip)]]'' finishes on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[March 21|21]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 21]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[March 22|22]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 22]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*22 – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]] released on DVD.
*[[March 23|23]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 23]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*23 – [[Obsession 4|''Obsession'' 4]] published.
*23 – [[Republic 74|''Republic'' 74]] published.
*23 – [[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith 2|''Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith'' 2]] published.
*[[March 24|24]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 24]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[March 25|25]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 25]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[March 28|28]] – [[Star Wars Insider 81|''Star Wars Insider'' 81]] published.
*[[March 31|31]] – [[Everyone's a Critic (article)|Everyone's a Critic]] article published on Wizards of the Coast website.
*31 – ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Movie Storybook]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Plea Bargain]]'' published.

==April==
*[[April 2|02]] – ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]'' published.
*02 – [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]] published.
*02 – [[Midnight Madness]] at Target, Wal-Mart and Toys R Us and 48 Hours of the Force commences.
*[[April 5|05]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Video Game]]'' released on PC, PS2, Xbox, and Gameboy Advanced.
*[[April 13|13]] – [[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith 3|''Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith'' 3]] published.
*[[April 20|20]] – [[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith 4|''Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith'' 4]] published.
*[[April 21|21]] – [[Celebration III]] begins.
*[[April 24|24]] – [[Celebration III]] held in Indianapolis, Indiana to celebrate the release of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']].
*[[April 27|27]] – [[Empire 30|''Empire'' 30]] published.
*27 – [[General Grievous 2|''General Grievous'' 2]] published.
*27 – [[Republic 75|''Republic'' 75]] published.
*27 – [[Star Wars: Empire: Volume Four: The Heart of the Rebellion|''Empire: Volume Four: The Heart of the Rebellion'']] published.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – Five [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] [[Gallery of TV Guide covers|''TV Guide'' covers]] published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (junior novelization)|''Revenge of the Sith'' junior novelization]] published.
*01 – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars—Free Comic Book Day 2005 Special]]'' published.
*[[May 5|05]] – ''[[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (video game)]]'' released on PS2, Xbox, GBA, Nintendo DS and Mobile Phones.
*05 – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' expansion pack released.
*[[May 10|10]] – ''[[Episode III: Revenge of the Sith: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' published.
*[[May 11|11]] – [[Star Wars Tales 23|''Star Wars Tales'' 23]] published.
*[[May 13|13]] – [[Wikipedia:MTV|MTV]] airs an episode of [[Wikipedia:Total Request Live|''Total Request Live'']] featuring the band [[Wikipedia:Good Charlotte|Good Charlotte]] to promote the upcoming [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].
*[[May 17|17]] – [[Star Wars Insider 82|''Star Wars Insider'' 82]] is released for subscribers.
*[[May 18|18]] – [[Empire 31|''Empire'' 31]] published.
*18 – [[Obsession 5|''Obsession'' 5]] published.
*[[May 19|19]] – [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|'''''Star Wars''''': '''Episode III''' '''''Revenge of the Sith''''']] released in the US.
*[[May 20|20]]-[[May 22|22]] – The sixth [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event begins at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios|Disney-MGM Studios]].
*[[May 27|27]]-[[May 29|29]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*29 – [[Wookieepedia|Star Wars Wiki]] mentioned in a [http://www.time.com/time/magazine/article/0,9171,1066904,00.html ''Time'' magazine article about Wikipedia].
*[[May 30|30]] – [[Star Wars Insider 82|''Star Wars Insider'' 82]] published.
*?? – [[Bai Ling]] poses for a ''Star Wars'' themed portfolio in [[Wikipedia:Playboy|Playboy]].
*?? – [[Droids, Technology and the Force: A Clash of Phenomena (article)|''Droids, Technology and the Force: A Clash of Phenomena'']] published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==June==
*[[June 3|03]]-[[June 5|05]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[June 10|10]]-[[June 12|12]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[June 15|15]] – [[General Grievous 3|''General Grievous'' 3]] published.
*15 – [[Republic 76|''Republic'' 76]] published.
*[[June 24|24]] – ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']] launched.
*[[June 29|29]] – [[Empire 32|''Empire'' 32]] is published.

==July==
*[[July 13|13]] – [[Star Wars Tales 24|''Star Wars Tales'' 24]] published.
*[[July 20|20]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 6: On the Fields of Battle]]'' published.
*20 – [[Empire 33|''Empire'' 33]] published.
*20 – [[Republic 77|''Republic'' 77]] published.
*20 – [[Star Wars Insider 83|''Star Wars Insider'' 83]] released for subscribers.
*20 – [[David Tomblin]] dies.
*[[July 21|21]] – [[Long John Baldry]] dies.
*[[July 25|25]] – [[Alf Joint]] dies.
*[[July 26|26]] – [[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King|''The Joiner King'']] published.
*?? – ''[[Vader: The Ultimate Guide]]'' one-shot souvenir magazine published.

==August==
*[[August 9|09]] – [[Katie Johnson]] dies.
*[[August 10|10]] – [[Empire 34|''Empire'' 34]] published.
*10 – [[General Grievous 4|''General Grievous'' 4]] published.
*[[August 23|23]] – [[Brock Peters]] dies.
*[[August 31|31]] – [[Michael Sheard]] dies.
*?? – [[Star Wars: Republic Commando: Order 66 (video game)|''Star Wars: Republic Commando: Order 66'']] released to Mobile Phone platform.
*?? – ''[[Evasive Action: Recruitment]]'' ongoing daily webstrip published on Hyperspace from August to December.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 83|''Star Wars Insider'' 83]] published.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning]]'' published.
*[[September 12|12]] – [[Peter Barbour]] dies.
*[[September 13|13]] – [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]] released for subscribers.
*[[September 14|14]] – [[Empire 35|''Empire'' 35]] published.
*[[September 19|19]] – [[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide|''The Ultimate Visual Guide'']] published.
*[[September 26|26]] – [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]] published.
*[[September 27|27]] – [[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen|''The Unseen Queen'']] published.
*[[September 28|28]] – [[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 1|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 1]] published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – ''[[Creating the Worlds of Star Wars: 365 Days]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Dressing a Galaxy: The Costumes of Star Wars]]'' published.
*[[October 2|02]] – [[Hamilton Camp]] dies.
*[[October 7|07]] – [[Charles Rocket]] dies.
*[[October 12|12]] – [[Empire 36|''Empire'' 36]] published.
*[[October 13|13]] – ''[[The Star Wars Poster Book]]'' published.
*[[October 17|17]] – [[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']] published.
*[[October 18|18]] – [[John Hollis]] dies.
*[[October 19|19]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4]]'' published.
*19 – [[Republic 78|''Republic'' 78]] published.
*[[October 23|23]] – [[William Hootkins]] dies.
*[[October 25|25]] – ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' published.
*[[October 26|26]] – [[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 2|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 2]] published.
*[[October 27|27]] – ''[[Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels]]'' published.
*27 – [[Star Wars: Where Science Meets Imagination]] opens at [[Wikipedia:Museum of Science, Boston|Museum of Science]] in Boston, Massachusetts

==November==
[[File:Battlefront2.jpg|thumb|''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' is released.]]
*[[November 1|01]] – [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] released on DVD.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' expansion released.
*[[November 8|08]] – ''[[Star Wars: Grievous Getaway]]'' released.
*[[November 9|09]] – [[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]] published.
*09 – [[Empire 37|''Empire'' 37]] published.
*[[November 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Insider 85|''Star Wars Insider'' 85]] released for subscribers.
*[[November 22|22]] – ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' published.
*[[November 23|23]] – [[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 3|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 3]] published.
*[[November 28|28]] – [[Star Wars Insider 85|''Star Wars Insider'' 85]] published.
*28 – [http://www.scifi.com SciFi.com] selects [[Wookieepedia]] as its Sci Fi Site of the Week.
*[[November 30|30]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 7: When They Were Brothers]]'' released.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: Battle for the Republic]]'' released.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' published.
*[[December 6|06]] – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume Two|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume Two]] released on DVD.
*[[December 21|21]] – [[Republic 80|''Republic'' 80]] published.
*21 – [[Empire 38|''Empire'' 38]] published.
*[[December 27|27]] – [[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War|''The Swarm War'']] published.
*[[December 28|28]] – ''[[Star Wars: Purge]]'' published.
*28 – [[Star Wars: General Grievous (TPB)|''General Grievous'' trade paperback]] released.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Manga: Black]]'' published.

==Unknown==
**''[[Polarization trilogy]]''
***''[[Challenge]]''
***''[[Revelations]]''
***''[[Showdown (Living Force)|Showdown]]''
**''[[For Every Action trilogy]]
***''[[Preemptive Strike]]''
***''[[Counterstrike (Living Force)|Counterstrike]]''
***''[[Strike III]]''
**''[[Heart of Evil trilogy]]''
***''[[A Plague of Darkness]]''
***''[[Destruction (Living Force adventure)|Destruction]]''
***''[[A Hero Seeks Not Vengeance]]''
*Publication of [[Star Wars (Semic/Egmont)|''Star Wars'']] ends.
----
